title: Experiment Title
summary: One or two sentences describing the public result or purpose of this experiment.

images.alt: Describe what is visible in the image
images.caption: Short figure caption

objective: What question is this experiment testing?
apparatus: List the circuit, geometry, materials, instruments, and safety constraints.
observations: Write the public observations, measurements, anomalies, and limits of confidence.
next: What should be tested, corrected, or repeated next?
